server.name: sage-kernel
server.description: MCP control surface for Sage Kernel OS.

resources.name: sage.catalog
resources.title: Sage Catalog
resources.description: Kernel catalog data for phases, repos, modules, templates, integrations, and QA profiles.

resources.name: sage.templates
resources.title: Sage Templates
resources.description: Project template catalog with coverage, stack, and QA profile metadata.

resources.name: sage.jobs
resources.title: Sage Jobs
resources.description: Worker job registry and schedule definitions.

resources.name: sage.runs
resources.title: Sage Runs
resources.description: Recent job run history from the dashboard snapshot.

resources.name: sage.approvals
resources.title: Sage Approvals
resources.description: Recent approval ledger entries from the dashboard snapshot.

resources.name: sage.docs.mcp-server
resources.title: Sage MCP Server Docs
resources.description: Canonical MCP server setup and verification documentation.

resources.name: sage.intelligence.contracts
resources.title: Sage Intelligence Contracts
resources.description: Read-only intelligence schemas and security boundaries for memory, evals, experiments, runbooks, and semantic code.

resources.name: sage.intelligence.memory
resources.title: Sage Intelligence Memory Fixture
resources.description: Validated memory-record fixture showing provenance, confidence, and supersession structure.

resources.name: sage.intelligence.evals
resources.title: Sage Intelligence Eval Definitions
resources.description: Validated eval definitions for deterministic release, MCP, dashboard, QA, and workflow checks.

resources.name: sage.intelligence.eval-report
resources.title: Sage Intelligence Latest Eval Report
resources.description: Latest local eval run report, or a missing-state object if no eval suite has run yet.

resources.name: sage.intelligence.experiments
resources.title: Sage Intelligence Experiment Fixture
resources.description: Validated experiment-run fixture showing bounded feedback-loop structure.

resources.name: sage.intelligence.runbooks
resources.title: Sage Intelligence Runbook Fixture
resources.description: Validated runbook fixture showing steps and verification commands.

resources.name: sage.intelligence.semantic-adapters
resources.title: Sage Intelligence Semantic Adapter Fixture
resources.description: Validated semantic-code adapter fixture showing read-only capability metadata.
